messages.content: The Blue Umbrella	USA RELEASED date

I could not find any specific information regarding the USA release date of the movie "The Blue Umbrella." It is possible that the movie may not have been released in the USA or there may not be a specific release date available.
The Blue Umbrella USA Released date
"The Blue Umbrella," a short film directed by Saschka Unseld, was released in the USA on June 21, 2013.
Get a Horse! USA Released date
"Get a Horse!," an animated short film featuring Mickey Mouse, was released in the USA on November 27, 2013.
Dug's Special Mission USA Released date

"Dug's Special Mission," a short film based on the movie "Up," was included as a bonus feature in the "Up" DVD and Blu-ray release. It was released in the USA on November 10, 2009, along with the home video release of "Up."
Hawaiian Vacation	USA Released date
"Hawaiian Vacation," a short film featuring characters from the "Toy Story" franchise, was released in the USA on June 24, 2011 as a part of the theatrical release of "Cars 2."
Small Fry	 USA Released date
"Small Fry," a short film featuring characters from the "Toy Story" franchise, was released in the USA on November 23, 2011, alongside the theatrical release of "The Muppets."
Partysaurus Rex USA Released date
"Partysaurus Rex," a short film featuring characters from the "Toy Story" franchise, was released in the USA on September 14, 2012, as a part of the theatrical re-release of "Finding Nemo" in 3D.
BURN-E USA Released date
"BURN-E," a short film set in the world of "WALL-E," was released in the USA on November 18, 2008, as a part of the DVD and Blu-ray release of "WALL-E."
La Luna USA Released date
"La Luna," a short film directed by Enrico Casarosa, was released in the USA on June 22, 2012, as a part of the theatrical release of Pixar's "Brave."
Lifted USA Released date
"Lifted," a short film directed by Gary Rydstrom, was released in the USA on June 29, 2007, alongside the theatrical release of Pixar's "Ratatouille."
For the Birds	USA Released date
"For the Birds," a short film directed by Ralph Eggleston, was released in the USA on November 2, 2001, alongside the theatrical release of Pixar's "Monsters, Inc."
One Man Band	 USA Released date
"One Man Band," a short film directed by Mark Andrews and Andrew Jimenez, was released in the USA on June 9, 2006, as a part of the theatrical release of Pixar's "Cars."
Boundin'	USA Released date

"Boundin'," a short film directed by Bud Luckey, was originally released in the USA on November 5, 2003, alongside the theatrical release of Pixar's "The Incredibles." However, it was also re-released in theaters on June 21, 2019, as a part of the "Pixar Short Films Collection Volume 3."
Jack-Jack Attack	USA Released date
"Jack-Jack Attack," a short film based on the movie "The Incredibles," was released in the USA on March 15, 2005, as a part of the DVD and Blu-ray release of "The Incredibles."
Day & Night USA Released date
"Day & Night," a short film directed by Teddy Newton, was released in the USA on June 18, 2010, as a part of the theatrical release of Pixar's "Toy Story 3."
Scrat Continental Crack Up USA Released date

"Scrat's Continental Crack-Up," a short film featuring the character Scrat from the "Ice Age" franchise, was released in the USA on December 17, 2010, as a part of the theatrical release of "Gulliver's Travels." It served as a teaser for the movie "Ice Age: Continental Drift."
Scrat Continental Crack Up Part 2 USA Released date

"Scrat's Continental Crack-Up: Part 2," the sequel to the short film "Scrat's Continental Crack-Up," was released in the USA on December 16, 2011, as a part of the theatrical release of "Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked." It also served as a teaser for the movie "Ice Age: Continental Drift."
Tick Tock Tale USA Released date
"Tick Tock Tale," a short film directed by Dean Wellins, was released in the USA on December 18, 2010, as a part of the theatrical release of Disney's "Tangled."
The Ballad of Nessie USA Released date
"The Ballad of Nessie," a short film featuring the Loch Ness Monster, was released in the USA on September 27, 2011, as a part of the theatrical release of Disney's "Winnie the Pooh."
Paperman USA Released date
"Paperman," a short film directed by John Kahrs, was released in the USA on November 2, 2012, alongside the theatrical release of Disney's "Wreck-It Ralph."
Tangled Ever Affter USA Released date

"Tangled Ever After," a short film sequel to "Tangled," was released in the USA on January 13, 2012, as a part of the theatrical release of Disney's "Beauty and the Beast 3D." It continues the story of Rapunzel and Eugene (Flynn Rider) after the events of the original film.
Feast USA Released date
"Feast," a short film directed by Patrick Osborne, was released in the USA on November 7, 2014, alongside the theatrical release of Disney's "Big Hero 6."
Frozen Ferver USA Released date
"Frozen Fever," a short film featuring characters from the movie "Frozen," was released in the USA on March 13, 2015, as a part of the theatrical release of Disney's "Cinderella."
